scripts.build:wasm: mkdir -p public && (cp ../hello-world/target/wasm32-wasip1/release/hello_world_plugin.wasm public/hello-world-plugin.wasm || echo 'Using existing WASM in public') && npx jco transpile public/hello-world-plugin.wasm -o src/generated --name hello-world --map refarm:sdk/kernel-bridge=../kernel-bridge.js
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && (vite build || echo 'Skipping production build: Generated JS missing')
